name: cache layer: changing rule options invalidates cached entries (options part of cache key)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/cli.sh" --rule trace-options --config '["error",{"max":5}]' --in "$PWD/f.js" --cache --cache-location "$PWD/.cache" >/dev/null 2>&1; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/cli.sh" --rule trace-options --config '["error",{"max":7}]' --in "$PWD/f.js" --cache --cache-location "$PWD/.cache" --report-format json 2>out.json && grep -E '"cache_status":"miss"' out.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
